/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libglint.so -o libglint.so CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/subband.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/mdct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/quantize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/huffman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/reservoir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/bitstream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glint_shared.dir/src/encoder.cpp.o
